Hand #2672141689 - Omaha (Pot Limit) - $0.01/$0.02 - 2026/02/16 05:54:54 UTC
Hoffman 6-max Seat #4 is the button
Seat 1: Jorgescu ($2.04)
Seat 2: DEATH2619 ($1.48)
Seat 4: TestHero ($2.00)
Seat 6: EmuSwag ($4.58)
EmuSwag posts the small blind $0.01
Jorgescu posts the big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to TestHero [6d 9h 3c Ac]
DEATH2619 folds
TestHero calls $0.02
EmuSwag raises $0.07 to $0.08
Jorgescu calls $0.06
TestHero raises $0.30 to $0.32
EmuSwag raises $0.96 to $1.04
Jorgescu folds
TestHero raises $1.68 to $2.00 and is all-in
EmuSwag calls $0.96
*** FLOP *** [7d Qs Th]
Main pot $3.88 | Rake $0.20
*** TURN *** [7d Qs Th] [8c]
Main pot $3.88 | Rake $0.20
*** RIVER *** [7d Qs Th 8c] [Tc]
Main pot $3.88 | Rake $0.20
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Main pot $3.88 | Rake $0.20
TestHero shows [6d 9h 3c Ac] (a straight, Ten high [Th 9h 8c 7d 6d])
EmuSwag shows [Ad Ah Jh 2d] (two pair, Aces and Tens [Ah Ad Th Tc Qs])
TestHero collected $3.88 from main pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $3.88 | Rake $0.14 | JP Fee $0.06
Board [7d Qs Th 8c Tc]
Seat 1: Jorgescu (big blind) folded on the Pre-Flop
Seat 2: DEATH2619 folded on the Pre-Flop and did not bet
Seat 4: TestHero (button) showed [6d 9h 3c Ac] and won $3.88 with a straight, Ten high [Th 9h 8c 7d 6d]
